plugins.microphonePermission: PikuAI uses the microphone so your child can ask questions by voice.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: PikuAI uses speech recognition to turn your child's voice into text before sending it safely.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PikuAI uses the microphone so your child can ask questions by voice.
